title: erysimum pusillum
intro: Erysimum pusillum, also known as small-flowered wallflower or small-flowered dog-tooth violet, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The medicinal properties of Erysimum pusillum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Erysimum pusillum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments.
